title: Grilled Padron Peppers with Pilaf
description: A simple Middle Eastern-inspired dish featuring grilled Padron peppers served with a flavorful pilaf.
instructions: 2. Brush the Padron peppers with olive oil and season with salt.
3. Grill the peppers for 3-4 minutes per side, or until charred.
4. Meanwhile, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
5. Add 1 teaspoon of fermented pepper paste and 1 teaspoon of Middle Eastern spice blend.
6. Stir to combine and cook for 1-2 minutes.
7. Add 1 cup of pilaf to the pan and stir to combine.
8. Cook for 1-2 minutes, or until heated through.
9. Serve the grilled Padron peppers with the pilaf mixture.
